description: Model a 12m x 16m flat-roofed commercial building in SketchUp Make 2017 with a 0.8m high parapet wall around the perimeter (total building height 4.8m to top of parapet). Read the zoning guidelines at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\zoning_guidelines.txt to determine the exact Street View observer coordinates. Create a SketchUp Scene named 'Street View' at that exact camera location. Use the Skelion plugin to place landscape solar panels tilted at 30 degrees on the roof. Ensure that absolutely no part of the solar array is visible above the parapet from the 'Street View' scene camera. Adjust the panel rows (setback) until they are completely hidden. Save the completed model to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\historic_solar.skp.
